mapper.insert: INSERT INTO settlements ( challenge_id, per_person_fee, total_participant_count, success_user_count, fail_user_count, failure_pool, participant_share_rate, platform_fee_rate, host_fee_rate, participant_share_amount, platform_fee_amount, host_fee_amount, profit_per_user, rounding_remainder, is_host_disqualified, status, settled_at ) VALUES ( #{challengeId}, #{perPersonFee}, #{totalParticipantCount}, #{successUserCount}, #{failUserCount}, #{failurePool}, #{participantShareRate}, #{platformFeeRate}, #{hostFeeRate}, #{participantShareAmount}, #{platformFeeAmount}, #{hostFeeAmount}, #{profitPerUser}, #{roundingRemainder}, #{isHostDisqualified}, #{status}, #{settledAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT challenge_id, total_participant_count, success_user_count, fail_user_count, failure_pool, participant_share_rate, platform_fee_rate, host_fee_rate, participant_share_amount, platform_fee_amount, host_fee_amount, profit_per_user, is_host_disqualified, status, settled_at FROM settlements WHERE challenge_id = #{challengeId}

SELECT cp.challenge_id, c.title, (cp.result = 'SUCCESS') AS is_success, s.settled_at, CASE WHEN cp.result = 'SUCCESS' THEN s.profit_per_user ELSE 0 END AS profit_amount FROM challenge_participants cp JOIN challenges c ON c.id = cp.challenge_id JOIN settlements s ON s.challenge_id = cp.challenge_id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND cp.result IS NOT NULL ORDER BY s.settled_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM challenge_participants cp WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND cp.result IS NOT NULL
